title: gilia californica
intro: Gilia californica, also known as California gilia or globe gilia, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the borage family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular remedy for colds, fever, and respiratory issues. Gilia californica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits in a variety of ways.
